features: Powerful Multipurpose Cleaner: This scented trigger spray effectively removes limescale, dirt, and grime from any room in your home, including the bathroom and kitchen.
Long-Lasting Fragrance: Enjoy a pleasant, lingering scent after cleaning with this multipurpose cleaner.
PH Neutral Formula: The pH-balanced formula is safe for use on various surfaces without causing damage.
Convenient Trigger Spray: The 750ml bottle features a trigger spray for easy application and controlled dispensing.
Versatile Cleaning Solution: Tackle tough cleaning tasks throughout your house with this multipurpose cleaner.
description: Product description Introducing the 3 Witches pH Neutro Multipurpose Powerful Household Scented Home Cleaning Spray - a versatile solution for tackling dirt and grime in any room of your house. This 750ml trigger spray boasts a long-lasting, pleasant scent that lingers after use, leaving your space refreshed. Formulated to effectively remove limescale, stubborn stains, and grime from surfaces in the bathroom, kitchen, and beyond, this cleaning spray packs a powerful punch. Its pH-neutral formula ensures safe usage on various materials without causing damage. Experience effortless cleaning with the convenient trigger spray mechanism that allows for precise application. Bid farewell to harsh odours and embrace a clean, inviting ambience with the 3 Witches Multipurpose Household Cleaning Spray. Ingredients Does Not Apply
